chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1661 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.7600/2020 2. For hearing of main case 21.03.2025 Mr. Imran Iqbal Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Rashid Arfi, advocate for respondent Mr. Aamir Raza, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly submitted that this petition is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court reported as 2019 PTD 1964, therefore, may be disposed of upon the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
